generator.title: Recipe Step Generator
generator.description: Upload a food photo and AI will generate step-by-step cooking instruction images.
generator.upload_hint: Drag and drop or click to upload a food photo (PNG, JPG, WebP, max 5MB)
generator.upload_error: Image upload failed. Please try again.
generator.upload_required: Please upload a food photo before generating.
generator.advanced_hint: Additional options like custom text overlays and color palettes will be available soon.
generator.no_results: Upload a food photo and click Generate to create recipe steps
generator.generating_hint: AI is analyzing your dish and generating cooking steps...
generator.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep creating.
generator.no_images_error: The provider returned no images. Please retry.
generator.timeout_error: Generation timed out. Please try again.
generator.status_pending: Waiting for the model to start...
